name: Mooncap Sprite GPT Edited Frames
description: Mooncap Sprite provider-edited production-path validation avatar.

locked.signatureFeature: small glowing moonstone crescent core embedded inside belly/chest
locked.silhouette: compact rounded mushroom-cap hood body with two tiny fixed nubs built into outline
locked.poseFraming: forward-facing centered desktop-overlay sprite with identical silhouette across states

stateActing.thinking: The mooncap itself looks thoughtful through upward/side eye direction, uncertain mouth, and a subtle internal moonstone-core swirl while the outer silhouette stays identical.
stateActing.focused: The mooncap itself looks intent through narrowed eyes, straight mouth, and a brighter sharper internal moonstone core while the outer silhouette stays identical.
stateActing.happy: The mooncap itself looks joyful through happy eyes, bigger smile, and a warmer brighter internal moonstone core while the outer silhouette stays identical.
stateActing.alert: The mooncap itself looks startled through wide round eyes, tiny open mouth, and a flaring internal moonstone core while the outer silhouette stays identical.
stateActing.sleepy: The mooncap itself looks tired through half-closed droopy eyes, sleepy mouth, and a dimmer internal moonstone core while the outer silhouette stays identical.
